title: Raid on the Jedi Temple (disambiguation)
content:
Several '''raids''', '''attacks''', or '''sieges''' on the Jedi Temple occurred throughout galactic history:

==Canon==
*[[Sacking of the Jedi Temple]]
*[[Bombing of the Jedi Temple hangar]]
*[[Bombing at the Jedi Temple]]
*[[Operation: Knightfall]], an attack undertaken by [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]] during the [[Clone Wars]].
*[[Hunt for Jocasta Nu]]
*[[Destruction of the Jedi Temple]]

==Legends==
*[[Raid on the Jedi Temple (Yinchorri Uprising)]], [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]
*[[Incident at the Jedi Temple]] ([[Xanatos]])
*[[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|Operation: Knightfall]], [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]
*[[Attack on the Sacred Spire]] ([[Lord Nyax]])
*[[Invasion of the New Jedi Temple]] ([[Galactic Alliance Guard]])
*[[Battle of Ossus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Ossus]], [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]
*[[Raid on the New Jedi Temple]]; [[43 ABY|43.5 ABY]]
*[[Siege of the New Jedi Temple]]; [[44 ABY]]
*[[Massacre at Ossus]], [[130 ABY]]
